who: fleet managers in logistics companies processing 10-20 invoices/month
offer: For fleet managers in logistics companies processing 10-20 invoices/month, inaccurate invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of delivery logs and invoices.
problem: Inaccurate invoicing due to mismatched delivery logs
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for fleet managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to fleet managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try manual entry of delivery logs and invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
